commits: caf6c76 - bober(sprint-2): three run-management MCP tools: list, get, abort

criteriaResults.evidence: src/mcp/tools/list-active-runs.ts: registerListActiveRunsTool, tool name bober_list_active_runs, optional status filter enum ['running','completed','failed','aborted']. 9 tests pass.
src/mcp/tools/get-run-status.ts: bober_get_run_status; full RunState for known runId; soft error {error:'Run not found'} for unknown; McpError for missing/empty. 7 tests pass.

src/mcp/tools/abort-run.ts: bober_abort_run; RunState.status widened with 'aborted'; abortedAt + abortReason fields added; soft error {error:'Run is not active'} for non-running. 10 tests including idempotency.
src/mcp/tools/index.ts: 'Multi-run management tools' section + all 3 register calls; docblock bumped 17→20; tools.test.ts 'registers exactly 20 tools' passes.
CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] section under ### Added lists all three tools with inputSchema + return shape including the aborted-state caveat about deferred subprocess termination.
typecheck 0, lint 0, build 0, test: 86 files, 1169 passed, 4 skipped. Also fixed tests/mcp/external-server-graph.test.ts hardcoded 17→20 counts.

filesChanged.description: RunState.status += 'aborted'; abortedAt + abortReason fields; abortRun() sets these (was failed/error); listAllRuns() added
List tool with optional status filter
[Unreleased] section with 3 new tools + RunState widening

notes: RunState.status now includes 'aborted'; abortedAt and abortReason fields added (no completedAt set for aborted runs — correct semantics). Forceful in-flight subprocess SIGTERM deferred per nonGoal #3; documented in CHANGELOG. One pre-existing test file (tests/mcp/external-server-graph.test.ts) had hardcoded 17-tool counts that needed bumping to 20.
